name: Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 large eggs, beaten or 1/2 cup egg product
1 pie crust, graham cracker crumb or prebaked crust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan combine gelatin, cornstarch, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger and salt.
2. Stir in pumpkin and evaporated skim milk. Let stand 5 minutes to soften gelatin.
3. Cook and stir over medium heat until mixture bubbles; cook and stir for 2 minutes more.
4. Remove from heat. Gradually stir 1 cup hot mixture into eggs; return egg mixture to saucepan.
5. Cook and stir over low heat for 2 minutes.
6. Do not boil. Remove from heat. Stir in Equal sweetener.
7. Pour into baked pie crust. Cover and chill 6 hours or overnight.
Makes 8 servings.
